prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》(1QM) 总纲——光明之子与黑暗之子的末日之战
prophecies.a: 在末日的终极之战中，光明之子将与黑暗之子展开七轮大战。前三轮光明之子获胜，接下来三轮黑暗之子反扑得手，第七轮上帝亲自干预，光明之子取得最终胜利。整场战争持续四十年。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll (1QM) Overview — The Final War of the Sons of Light vs. Sons of Darkness
prophecies.a_en: In the ultimate eschatological war, the Sons of Light will engage the Sons of Darkness in seven rounds of battle. The Sons of Light prevail in the first three rounds, the Sons of Darkness counterattack and win the next three, and in the seventh round God himself intervenes to grant the Sons of Light final victory. The entire war lasts forty years.

prophecies.q: 《战争卷轴》(1QM) 第一阶段——对列国的战争
prophecies.a: 第一阶段战争将针对「基提人」（罗马人）和违反盟约的犹太人。光明之子将从旷野出发，先征服耶路撒冷周围的异族，然后扩展到埃及、亚述和巴比伦，最终征服所有国家。
prophecies.q_en: War Scroll (1QM) Phase One — War Against the Nations
prophecies.a_en: The first phase of war targets the 'Kittim' (Romans) and covenant-breaking Jews. The Sons of Light will march from the wilderness, first conquering foreign nations around Jerusalem, then expanding to Egypt, Assyria, and Babylon, ultimately conquering all nations.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 库姆兰社区在公元68年被罗马军团摧毁，社区成员被杀或逃散。预言中光明之子战胜「基提人」（罗马人）的战争从未发生，相反，罗马于公元70年摧毁了耶路撒冷圣殿。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Qumran community was destroyed by Roman legions in 68 AD, with members killed or scattered. The prophesied war where the Sons of Light defeat the 'Kittim' (Romans) never occurred; instead, Rome destroyed the Jerusalem Temple in 70 AD.

prophecies.a: 在末日之战中，天使长米迦勒将率领天使大军降临战场，与光明之子并肩作战。黑暗天使彼列（撒旦）则率领邪恶势力对抗。最终上帝将永远消灭黑暗，建立永恒的光明国度。
prophecies.a_en: In the final war, the archangel Michael will descend with heavenly armies to fight alongside the Sons of Light. The angel of darkness Belial (Satan) leads the forces of evil in opposition. Ultimately God will destroy darkness forever and establish an eternal kingdom of light.

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷注释》(1QpHab) 论「基提人」的征服
prophecies.a: 基提人（被学者普遍认为指罗马人）将席卷大地，征服众多国家。他们迅捷而残忍，摧毁一切挡路之物。他们向各国征收贡品，掠夺财富，但终将在上帝的审判日灭亡。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Habakkuk (1QpHab) — On the Conquest of the Kittim
prophecies.a_en: The Kittim (widely identified by scholars as Romans) will sweep across the earth and conquer many nations. They are swift and ruthless, destroying all in their path. They exact tribute from nations and plunder wealth, but will ultimately perish on God's day of judgment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 罗马帝国确实在地中海世界建立了霸权，征服了包括犹太地区在内的广大领土，征收贡品并掠夺财富。这些描述与历史高度吻合。但「上帝审判日灭亡」的预言并未如社区所期待的那样迅速发生——罗马帝国持续了数百年，最终于公元476年（西罗马）因多种复杂因素衰亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Roman Empire did indeed establish hegemony across the Mediterranean, conquering vast territories including Judea, exacting tribute and plundering wealth — matching the description closely. However, the predicted swift divine destruction did not occur as the community expected; Rome endured for centuries, with the Western Empire falling in 476 AD due to complex factors.

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷注释》(1QpHab) 论「邪恶祭司」
prophecies.a: 邪恶的祭司最初被任命时是忠于真理的，但当他掌权统治以色列后，他的心变得骄傲，他背弃了上帝，为了财富而背叛律法。他掠夺人民的财富，积聚罪恶的钱财。最终上帝将把他交给仇敌之手受审。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Habakkuk (1QpHab) — On the Wicked Priest
prophecies.a_en: The Wicked Priest was initially faithful to truth when appointed, but after gaining power over Israel, his heart grew proud. He abandoned God and betrayed the law for wealth. He plundered the people's riches and accumulated sinful wealth. Ultimately God will deliver him into the hands of his enemies for judgment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「邪恶祭司」的身份在学术界有多种推测，最常见的候选人是哈斯蒙尼王朝的大祭司，如约拿单·马加比（前161-143年在位）或西蒙·马加比。哈斯蒙尼祭司-国王确实将宗教权力与政治权力合一，并因世俗化和专权而受到批评。约拿单·马加比最终被叙利亚将军特里丰诱捕杀害，可对应「交给仇敌之手」。
prophecies.verdict_en: The identity of the 'Wicked Priest' is debated among scholars; leading candidates include Hasmonean high priests such as Jonathan Maccabeus (r. 161-143 BC) or Simon Maccabeus. The Hasmonean priest-kings did merge religious and political authority and were criticized for secularization. Jonathan was indeed captured and killed by the Seleucid general Trypho, potentially fulfilling 'delivered into enemy hands.'

prophecies.q: 《哈巴谷注释》(1QpHab) 论末日的延迟
prophecies.a: 上帝告诉哈巴谷将末日写下来，但没有告诉他末日何时到来。末日的最终时刻将超出先知们所预言的一切时间，因为上帝的奥秘是奇妙的。末日虽然延迟，但必然到来，绝不会迟到。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Habakkuk (1QpHab) — On the Delay of the End
prophecies.a_en: God told Habakkuk to write down the end times, but did not tell him when they would come. The final moment will exceed all times prophesied, for God's mysteries are wondrous. Though the end is delayed, it will surely come and will not be late.

prophecies.q: 弥赛亚预言文本 (4Q521)——弥赛亚的神迹
prophecies.a: 天地将听从弥赛亚的命令。他来临时，天将与地融合，万物归一。主将行前所未有的大事：他将治愈伤者，使死人复活，向贫穷人传好消息，使饥饿者得饱足，引领流亡者归来。
prophecies.q_en: Messianic Apocalypse (4Q521) — Signs of the Messiah
prophecies.a_en: Heaven and earth will obey the Messiah's command. When he comes, heaven shall merge with earth and all things become one. The Lord will perform unprecedented wonders: he will heal the wounded, resurrect the dead, bring good news to the poor, satisfy the hungry, and lead the exiled home.

prophecies.q: 双弥赛亚教义——祭司弥赛亚与王室弥赛亚
prophecies.a: 在末日来临时，将有两位受膏者（弥赛亚）出现：一位是亚伦的弥赛亚（祭司弥赛亚），另一位是以色列的弥赛亚（王室弥赛亚）。祭司弥赛亚的地位高于王室弥赛亚，在末世宴席上祭司弥赛亚先祝福饼和酒。
prophecies.q_en: Dual Messiah Doctrine — Priestly and Royal Messiahs
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, two anointed ones (Messiahs) will appear: the Messiah of Aaron (priestly Messiah) and the Messiah of Israel (royal Messiah). The priestly Messiah holds higher rank than the royal Messiah, and at the eschatological banquet the priestly Messiah blesses the bread and wine first.

prophecies.a: 上帝已经设定了邪恶存在的期限。在预定的审判之时，上帝将用真理净化人类的一切作为，炼净人的身体，以消灭一切不义之灵。上帝将如同净化之水洒在义人身上，洗净一切谎言的污秽。
prophecies.a_en: God has set a limit to the existence of wickedness. At the appointed time of judgment, God will purify all human deeds with truth, refining the body to destroy every spirit of injustice. God will sprinkle upon the righteous like purifying water, cleansing all defilement of falsehood.

prophecies.q: 《社区规章》(1QS) 两灵论——光明与黑暗之灵
prophecies.a: 上帝创造了两种灵来统管人类直到末日：真理之灵（光明之子的引导者）和谬误之灵（黑暗之子的统治者）。两灵在每个人心中争战。在当前的时代，黑暗似乎占上风，但到了上帝所定的末期，真理将永远战胜谬误。
prophecies.q_en: Community Rule (1QS) — Doctrine of Two Spirits
prophecies.a_en: God created two spirits to govern humanity until the end: the spirit of truth (guide of the Sons of Light) and the spirit of falsehood (ruler of the Sons of Darkness). The two spirits war within every human heart. In the current age, darkness seems to prevail, but at God's appointed end, truth will triumph over falsehood forever.

prophecies.q: 《圣殿卷轴》(11QT) 理想圣殿的蓝图
prophecies.a: 上帝将亲手建造一座终极圣殿，取代人手所造的一切圣殿。这座圣殿将在创世之日就已注定，存续到永远。圣殿的规模远超所罗门圣殿和第二圣殿，其建造方式和祭祀礼仪都将严格遵循上帝的直接启示。
prophecies.q_en: Temple Scroll (11QT) — Blueprint of the Ideal Temple
prophecies.a_en: God himself will build an ultimate Temple to replace all man-made temples. This Temple was foreordained from the day of creation and will endure forever. Its scale far surpasses Solomon's Temple and the Second Temple, with construction and ritual strictly following God's direct revelation.

prophecies.q: 《那鸿注释》(4QpNah) 论「猛狮」与耶路撒冷
prophecies.a: 「猛狮」（被学者认为是塞琉古国王德米特里三世）将攻打耶路撒冷。「寻求光滑事物的人」（法利赛人）曾邀请他入侵，但「猛狮」会对他们施以残酷的报复——将活人挂在木头上。从前在以色列从未有过这样的事。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Nahum (4QpNah) — On the 'Furious Young Lion' and Jerusalem
prophecies.a_en: The 'Furious Young Lion' (identified by scholars as Seleucid King Demetrius III) will attack Jerusalem. The 'seekers of smooth things' (Pharisees) had invited him to invade, but the 'lion' will exact cruel revenge — hanging men alive on wood. Such a thing had never before happened in Israel.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 学术界普遍认为此段描述的是哈斯蒙尼国王亚历山大·亚奈（前103-76年在位）。公元前88年法利赛人叛乱并邀请塞琉古王德米特里三世入侵，叛乱失败后亚历山大·亚奈将800名法利赛人钉十字架。约瑟夫斯《犹太古史》13.14.2记载了这一事件，与古卷描述高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Scholars widely identify this passage as describing Hasmonean King Alexander Jannaeus (r. 103-76 BC). In 88 BC, Pharisees revolted and invited Seleucid King Demetrius III to invade; after the revolt failed, Jannaeus crucified 800 Pharisees. Josephus (Antiquities 13.14.2) records this event, closely matching the scroll's description.

prophecies.q: 《那鸿注释》(4QpNah) 论「寻求光滑事物的人」的末日
prophecies.a: 「寻求光滑事物的人」（法利赛人）的议会将在末日被消灭。他们的一切谋划将被揭露，他们的罪行在全以色列面前暴露无遗。他们的追随者将四散奔逃，不再有人被他们的教导所迷惑。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Nahum (4QpNah) — On the End of the 'Seekers of Smooth Things'
prophecies.a_en: The council of the 'seekers of smooth things' (Pharisees) will be destroyed at the end of days. All their schemes will be exposed, their crimes laid bare before all Israel. Their followers will scatter, and no one will be led astray by their teachings anymore.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 法利赛派不仅未被消灭，反而成为犹太教存续的核心力量。公元70年圣殿被毁后，法利赛传统演变为拉比犹太教，成为至今仍在延续的犹太教主流形式。库姆兰社区本身反而在公元68年被罗马摧毁后消亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: Far from being destroyed, the Pharisees became the core force of Jewish survival. After the Temple's destruction in 70 AD, Pharisaic tradition evolved into Rabbinic Judaism, which remains the mainstream form of Judaism today. The Qumran community itself was destroyed by Rome in 68 AD and ceased to exist.

prophecies.q: 《感恩诗篇》(1QH) 末日审判的景象
prophecies.a: 在末日审判之时，地狱之门大开，死亡的陷阱张开，灭亡的深渊裂开。地上的根基震动，战争在地下的深渊中爆发。大地发出呻吟，分娩的剧痛降临。一切都在痛苦中等待新世界的诞生。
prophecies.q_en: Thanksgiving Hymns (1QH) — Vision of Final Judgment
prophecies.a_en: At the time of final judgment, the gates of Sheol open wide, the snares of death spread out, and the chasms of perdition gape. The foundations of earth tremble, war erupts in the subterranean abyss. The earth groans and birth pangs descend. All things await in agony the birth of a new world.

prophecies.a: 虫蛆中的死者将从尘土中被举起，背负罪孽的人将获得永恒的启示。上帝将使朽坏的灵魂获得永生，将义人的灵从坟墓中提升到永恒的高处，使他们与天使同列。
prophecies.q_en: Thanksgiving Hymns (1QH) — Resurrection of the Righteous
prophecies.a_en: The dead among the worms shall be raised from dust, and those burdened with guilt shall receive eternal revelation. God will grant eternal life to decaying spirits, raising the souls of the righteous from the grave to eternal heights, placing them among the angels.

prophecies.q: 《默基洗德卷》(11Q13) 末日审判者默基洗德
prophecies.a: 在末日的第十个禧年，默基洗德将来临，对彼列和他的灵执行审判。他将宣告大赦，释放所有被黑暗势力俘虏的人。这就是以赛亚所预言的「传好信息给锡安的人」。默基洗德将成为末日审判的执行者。
prophecies.q_en: Melchizedek Scroll (11Q13) — Melchizedek as Eschatological Judge
prophecies.a_en: In the tenth and final Jubilee, Melchizedek will come to execute judgment against Belial and his spirits. He will proclaim the great liberation, freeing all captives of dark forces. This is the one Isaiah prophesied as 'the herald of good news to Zion.' Melchizedek will serve as the executor of final judgment.

prophecies.q: 《大马士革文献》(CD) 新约的建立
prophecies.a: 在大马士革之地，一批忠信者与上帝立了新约。他们离开了犹大之地，前往北方，在那里建立了义的社区。末日来临时，凡背弃新约的人都将被从生命册上除名，与邪恶的人一同灭亡。
prophecies.q_en: Damascus Document (CD) — Establishment of the New Covenant
prophecies.a_en: In the land of Damascus, a group of faithful ones entered a new covenant with God. They departed from the land of Judah and went north, establishing a community of righteousness. When the end comes, all who betrayed the new covenant will be blotted from the book of life and perish with the wicked.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 库姆兰社区确实建立了一个与主流犹太教分离的「新约」社区，实行严格的宗教规条和公社生活。但「大马士革」是否为实际地名仍有争议（可能是隐喻）。社区于公元68年被毁，未能存续至所预言的末日。不过「新约」概念深刻影响了早期基督教的「新约」神学。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Qumran community did establish a separatist 'new covenant' community with strict religious rules and communal living. Whether 'Damascus' is literal or metaphorical remains debated. The community was destroyed in 68 AD, not surviving to the predicted end times. However, the 'new covenant' concept profoundly influenced early Christian 'New Testament' theology.

prophecies.q: 《以赛亚注释》(4QpIsa) 末世之战中耶路撒冷的命运
prophecies.a: 在末日之时，列国将聚集攻打耶路撒冷。圣城将经历极大的苦难和围困。但最终，上帝将从锡安兴起拯救者，击败攻城的敌人。耶路撒冷将被洁净，成为永恒的圣城。
prophecies.q_en: Pesher Isaiah (4QpIsa) — Jerusalem's Fate in the Eschatological War
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, nations will gather to attack Jerusalem. The holy city will endure great suffering and siege. But ultimately, God will raise a savior from Zion to defeat the besieging enemies. Jerusalem will be purified and become the eternal holy city.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 耶路撒冷确实多次遭受围困和攻打：公元70年罗马围城并摧毁圣殿，公元135年巴尔·科赫巴起义后罗马再次夷平耶路撒冷并改名。此后耶路撒冷在十字军东征、奥斯曼等时期反复易手。1948年以色列建国后耶路撒冷被分割，1967年以色列统一耶路撒冷。城市至今仍是地缘政治争议焦点，「永恒圣城」的预言未完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Jerusalem has indeed been besieged and attacked multiple times: Rome destroyed the Temple in 70 AD, razed the city again after the Bar Kokhba revolt in 135 AD. The city changed hands during the Crusades, Ottoman era, and more. After Israel's founding in 1948 Jerusalem was divided; Israel unified it in 1967. The city remains a geopolitical flashpoint, and the 'eternal holy city' prophecy remains incompletely fulfilled.
